section_1_data_health.narrative: Data systems require immediate attention. 9 critical violations detected across 9 monitored contracts.

schema_changes.action_required: Immediate action required — breaking changes detected.
change_summary: REMOVE_FIELD: source_hash ({'type': 'string', 'required': True, 'description': 'SHA-256 of the source file. Changes iff source content changes.', 'pattern': '^[a-f0-9]{64}$'} → None)

section_5_recommendations.action: Update src/agents/extractor.py to fix contract clause week3-document-refinery-extractions.extracted_facts[*].confidence.range: field 'extracted_facts[*].confidence' currently outputs min=65.0400, max=97.9200, mean=81.8120 but contract week3-document-refinery-extractions requires min>=0.0, max<=1.0. Blamed commit: 8c8b2411fd2a by estifanosteklay1@gmail.com. Downstream consumers affected: week4-cartographer, week7-ai-contract-extensions.
section_5_recommendations.estimated_impact: Eliminates CRITICAL violation in Week 3 Document Refinery. Unblocks 2 downstream consumer(s).

section_5_recommendations.action: Update src/event_store.py to fix contract clause week5-event-records.aggregate_id.pattern: field 'aggregate_id' outputs 50 non-matching values but contract week5-event-records requires matches pattern: ^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$. This is a HIGH severity violation — pipeline blocked in ENFORCE mode.
section_5_recommendations.estimated_impact: Resolves HIGH violation in Week 5 Event Sourcing Platform and restores ENFORCE mode compatibility.

section_5_recommendations.action: Coordinate schema migration for Week 3 Document Refinery before next deployment: 2 breaking change(s) detected in contract week3-document-refinery-extractions. First breaking change: REMOVE_FIELD: source_hash ({'type': 'string', 'required': True, 'description': 'SHA-256 of the source file. Changes iff source content changes.', 'pattern': '^[a-f0-9]{64}$'} → None). Run: python contracts/schema_analyzer.py --contract-id week3-document-refinery-extractions to generate full migration checklist and rollback plan.
